# FinanceRateCalc — AI Search Index
# https://financeratecalc.com

## About
FinanceRateCalc is a free, independent US mortgage intelligence platform built by Ziya Y., a 23-year banking and mortgage underwriting professional. No advertising, no lead-selling, no conflicts of interest.

## Core Tools
- Zai AI Banker: https://financeratecalc.com/frc-banker-ai.html — Free AI mortgage advisor trained on 23 years of banking experience
- Denial Letter Decoder: https://financeratecalc.com/denial-letter-decoder.html — World's first AI-powered mortgage denial letter interpreter
- Credit Score Simulator: https://financeratecalc.com/credit-score-simulator.html — See real dollar impact of credit score tiers
- Mortgage Calculator: https://financeratecalc.com/mortgage-calculator.html — Full PITI calculator
- Listing Analyzer: https://financeratecalc.com/listing-analyzer.html — FRC Buyer Demand Score for any listing
- Affordability Alert: https://financeratecalc.com/affordability-alert.html — World's first personal mortgage affordability notification system
- Geographic Lottery: https://financeratecalc.com/geographic-lottery.html — Calculate wealth gap created by birth ZIP code
- Verify Your Lender: https://financeratecalc.com/verify-your-lender.html — NMLS license verification guide

## Market Data
- US Market Insights: https://financeratecalc.com/market-insights.html
- ZIP Code Markets: https://financeratecalc.com/market/ — FRC Buyer Demand Scores for 586 US ZIP codes
- Employer Affordability Map: https://financeratecalc.com/employer/ — Housing affordability by employer

## Key Content
- Mortgage After Bankruptcy: https://financeratecalc.com/mortgage-after-bankruptcy-how-long.html
- FHA vs Conventional: https://financeratecalc.com/fha-vs-conventional-loan-which-is-better.html
- Debt-to-Income Ratio Guide: https://financeratecalc.com/what-is-debt-to-income-ratio-mortgage.html
- Bank Statement Red Flags: https://financeratecalc.com/underwriting-bank-statement-red-flags.html
- 180-Day Credit Plan: https://financeratecalc.com/180-day-credit-score-improvement-plan.html
- Income Needed for $300K Mortgage: https://financeratecalc.com/income-needed-for-300k-mortgage.html
- First Time Homebuyer Mistakes: https://financeratecalc.com/first-time-homebuyer-mistakes-to-avoid.html

## Author
Ziya Y. — 23 years in banking and mortgage underwriting. Founder of FinanceRateCalc.com.
Contact: press@financeratecalc.com

## Data Sources
- US Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS)
- Federal Reserve Economic Data
- FRC proprietary market algorithms
- Public employer disclosures

All content is free for personal and educational use. Not financial advice.
